2605.07930.title: INO-SGD: Addressing Utility Imbalance under Individualized Differential Privacy
2605.07930.paper_summary: Differential privacy (DP) is widely employed in machine learning to protect confidential or sensitive training data from being revealed. As data owners gain greater control over their data due to personal data ownership, they are more likely to set their own privacy requirements, necessitating individualized DP (IDP) to fulfil such requests. In particular, owners of data from more sensitive subsets, such as positive cases of stigmatized diseases, likely set stronger privacy requirements, as leakage of such data could incur more serious societal impact. However, existing IDP algorithms induce a critical utility imbalance problem: Data from owners with stronger privacy requirements may be severely underrepresented in the trained model, resulting in poorer performance on similar data from subsequent users during deployment. In this paper, we analyze this problem and propose the INO-SGD algorithm, which strategically down-weights data within each batch to improve performance on the more private data across all iterations. Notably, our algorithm is specially designed to satisfy IDP, while existing techniques addressing utility imbalance neither satisfy IDP nor can be easily adapted to do so. Lastly, we demonstrate the empirical feasibility of our approach.
2605.07930.paper_summary_zh: 差分隱私（DP）在機器學習中被廣泛應用，以保護機密或敏感的訓練數據不被揭露。隨著數據擁有者因個人數據所有權而獲得對其數據的更大控制權，他們更有可能設定自己的隱私要求，這使得個性化差分隱私（IDP）成為滿足這些要求的必要條件。特別是，來自更敏感子集的數據擁有者，例如被污名化疾病的陽性病例，可能會設定更強的隱私要求，因為這類數據的洩漏可能會帶來更嚴重的社會影響。然而，現有的IDP算法會引發一個關鍵的效用不平衡問題：擁有更強隱私要求的數據擁有者的數據在訓練模型中可能會被嚴重低估，導致在部署期間對於後續用戶的類似數據表現較差。在本文中，我們分析了這個問題並提出了INO-SGD算法，該算法在每個批次中策略性地降低數據的權重，以提高所有迭代中對於更私密數據的性能。值得注意的是，我們的算法專門設計以滿足IDP，而現有的解決效用不平衡的技術既不滿足IDP，也無法輕易調整以滿足該要求。最後，我們展示了我們方法的實證可行性。
2605.07930.author: Xiao Tian et.al.
2605.07930.authors: Xiao Tian, Jue Fan, Rachael Hwee Ling Sim, Bryan Kian Hsiang Low
